data.title: C3.ai stock up nearly 16% in pre-market trading as talks of a merger with Automation Anywhere emerge. Deal could result in Automation Anywhere acquiring C3.ai and going public. C3.ai offers enterprise AI software; Automation Anywhere valued at $6.8 billion in 2019. C3.ai founder Thomas Siebel steps down as CEO amid merger talks.
data.description: C3.ai Inc. saw its stock (NYSE: AI) experience a significant surge of 15.87% in the pre-market trading session on Wednesday. Reports have emerged indicating that discussions are underway for a potential merger between C3.ai, an enterprise AI software provider, and Automation Anywhere, a software company. If this merger indeed materializes, it would entail Automation Anywhere acquiring C3.ai and subsequently launching as a publicly traded entity. C3.ai specializes in supplying enterprise AI software utilized by various clients, including the likes of the U.S. Air Force, operating across sectors such as energy and manufacturing. On the other hand, Automation Anywhere is focused on developing task-automation software and was previously valued at $6.8 billion by private investors in 2019. Following the departure of C3.ai's founder, Thomas Siebel, from the CEO position, the company is yet to formally comment on this potential deal. This development marks a notable event in the industry landscape and the full details can be found on platforms like Benzinga.com.

data.title: Stocks surge with Nasdaq eyeing record high; Dow Jones Futures up. Tesla, Meta, Microsoft in spotlight. Fed's Powell to speak.
data.description: Numerous stocks showed upward momentum with the Nasdaq leading the way and the S&P 500 reaching a peak. However, attention is now turning to key players such as Tesla, Microsoft, Meta, and Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. Dow Jones Futures are indicating a positive outlook with the Nasdaq potentially setting a new all-time high. These developments come amid a dynamic market environment where investor focus is on influential companies and potential market-moving events.

data.title: CN (CNR) increases dividend by 3% and launches share repurchase program under new normal course issuer bid.
data.description: In Montreal on January 30, 2026, CN (CNR on TSX, CNI on NYSE) revealed a 3% surge in the 2026 dividend for its common shares, sanctioned by the Board of Directors. Additionally, the Board approved the repurchase of company shares through a freshly implemented normal course issuer bid.

data.title: Banco Santander Chile Q4 report: EPS $0.9 beats estimate by 53%, Revenue up $177M from last year.
data.description: Banco Santander Chile (NYSE: BSAC) released its Q4 earnings report on Friday, January 30, 2026 at 06:16 AM. The report revealed that the bank surpassed estimated earnings by 53.0%, with an EPS of $0.9 compared to the estimated $0.59. Additionally, the revenue increased by $177.00 million from the corresponding period the previous year. This strong performance indicates significant growth and a positive outlook for Banco Santander Chile. For more details, the complete news article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Brookfield Renewable Q4 earnings report: EPS beats estimates by 246% at $0.54, revenue up $107M from last year.
data.description: Brookfield Renewable (NYSE: BEP) released its Q4 earnings on Friday, January 30, 2026, at 07:00 AM. They exceeded expectations by 246.0%, posting an EPS of $0.54 compared to the estimated $-0.37. Their revenue increased by $107.00 million year-over-year. This surpasses their previous earnings records. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: WisdomTree (WT) Q4 earnings beat estimates by 26.0%, with EPS of $0.29 (vs. $0.23 est.) and revenue up $36.74 million.
data.description: WisdomTree (NYSE: WT) recently disclosed their Q4 earnings report on January 30, 2026, at 07:00 AM. data.title: PPL Corp (NYSE:PPL) to conduct webcast on 2025 earnings results on Feb. 20. Vincent Sorgi, CEO, will lead discussion.
data.description: PPL Corporation, a leading energy company listed on the NYSE under ticker symbol PPL, has announced that it will unveil its consolidated financial performance for the fourth quarter and full-year of 2025 on Friday, February 20. The President and CEO of PPL, Vincent Sorgi, alongside other key executives, will delve into the details of the earnings results. This update comes from Allentown, Pennsylvania, and marks a pivotal moment for the company as stakeholders anticipate the figures that will be presented.
Achievement: Completed successful placement of bond tap issue, raising $50 million for company expansion.

data.title: Wall Street traders predict S&P 500 to soar to 7600-7800 by Dec. 31, 2026 according to Kalshi, with 19% wagers in that range.
data.description: Traders on Kalshi predict that the S&P 500 will reach between 7600 and 7800 by December 31, 2026. Currently, 19% of traders foresee the index closing within this range. This forecast suggests a bullish sentiment, projecting a continued uptrend for the benchmark index tracking major U.S. stocks. In 2025, the S&P 500 saw gains of approximately 16-18% amid a volatile year influenced by President Donald Trump's actions. These insights are drawn from a prediction market contract on Kalshi regarding the S&P 500's year-end 2026 performance.

data.title: ChoiceOne Financial Services, Inc. released Q4 2025 results, showing performance compared to 2024 with significant changes.
data.description: In Sparta, Michigan on January 30, 2026, ChoiceOne Financial Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: COFS), the holding company for ChoiceOne Bank, disclosed financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. The report highlighted key factors influencing results for the comparable periods in 2024 and 2025.

data.title: Bonaccord Capital Partners named 2025 Middle Market GP Stakes Firm of the Year by GP Stakes News.
data.description: P10, Inc. (NYSE: PX), a prominent private markets solutions provider, and Bonaccord Capital Partners, a private equity firm specializing in offering growth capital and strategic assistance to middle-market private market sponsors, have jointly declared that Bonaccord has been honored with the title of 2025 Middle Market GP Stakes Firm of the Year by GP Stakes News. This recognition underscores Bonaccord's exceptional performance in the industry. The acknowledgment solidifies their position as a leading entity in this sector.

data.title: Trump criticizes Fed Chair Powell for keeping interest rates high, says rates will drop 'a lot' with new Chair. Announcement coming soon. More on Benzinga.com.
data.description: President Donald Trump once again criticized the Federal Reserve and Chair Jerome Powell for maintaining high interest rates, expressing his belief that rates will drop substantially with the next Chair. During a speech in Iowa, Trump accused Powell of being too slow and hesitant in implementing monetary policies, referring to him as "too late." Trump suggested that Powell is intentionally keeping borrowing costs high, alleging that Powell "wants to keep rates as high as possible," despite his administration's efforts to lower rates. With Powell's impending departure in May, Trump stated that a new "great" Fed chairman will be appointed soon. Trump's comments were made during a speech in Iowa, where he expressed his confidence that interest rates will see significant declines in the near future.

data.title: Society Pass, NusaTrip, and Gother partner for flight distribution in $84 billion Thailand travel market. Strengthen NusaTrip's presence.
data.description: Jakarta, Indonesia - January 30, 2026 - Society Pass Incorporated (Nasdaq: SOPA), a leading digital ecosystem in Southeast Asia, and its majority-owned subsidiary NusaTrip Inc (Nasdaq: NUTR), a prominent travel technology platform in Southeast Asia and Asia-Pacific, have announced a strategic collaboration with Search Engine Optimization Company Limited (“Gother”), an emerging online travel agency in Thailand. Through this partnership, NusaTrip will provide flight content to Gother, expanding air travel distribution in Thailand and across Southeast Asia. This move reinforces NusaTrip's position as a key flight content provider in the regional travel industry.

data.title: Max Power plans to drill second natural hydrogen well in Saskatchewan, 325 km SW of Lawson discovery. View documentary at maxpowermining.com.
data.description: Watch the informative documentary video on the potential of natural hydrogen in Saskatchewan, highlighting MAX Power's efforts in the sector. Learn more at the provided link for insights into this innovative energy source.

data.title: OR Royalties appoints Kevin Thomson to its Board of Directors, while William Murray John resigns.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, OR Royalties Inc. appointed Mr. Kevin Thomson as an Independent Director to its Board of Directors. The company, listed as OR on both the TSX and NYSE, also disclosed the resignation of Mr. William Murray John from the Board, with immediate effect.

data.title: HPQ confirms pilot-scale fumed silica meets grade 150, replicating lab findings in a scalable plasma process.
data.description: HPQ has verified that pilot-scale fumed silica has achieved a commercial grade of 150, matching the results obtained in the laboratory. This development confirms the effectiveness of a plasma process that can be scaled up for commercial production.

data.description: WisdomTree (NYSE: WT) released its Q4 earnings on Friday, January 30, 2026, at 07:00 AM. The key highlights include surpassing estimated earnings by 26.0%, with an EPS of $0.29 compared to the expected $0.23.
